text:
いやー、爽快爽快！
こうもうまくいくなんて
わたしたちって、かなりスゴくない？

あなたがスゴいのは、ずっと一緒に
やって来て、よーく知ってるけど……

いいパートナーに巡り会えて
本当に幸せだよー！

I'd say that was exhilarating!
We're pretty incredible, huh?
Just plowing right through this place like that.

I can definitely vouch for you.
I've seen the amazing sort of stuff you've
pulled off on all our adventures.

And I've got to say, I couldn't be happier to
have found a perfect ally like you!
